title: Palantir Price Target Raised to $225 by Citi
text: Citi increased its price target on Palantir Technologies (PLTR) to $225 from $210, maintaining a Buy rating following the company's first-quarter earnings report. The analyst noted that AI demand is accelerating the company's U.S. business. The adjustment came after Palantir reported an 85% revenue jump to $1.633 billion in Q1, with U.S. revenue surging 104% to $1.282 billion. The company has also raised its 2026 revenue guidance to between $7.650 billion and $7.662 billion. Other analysts have similarly shown confidence in the stock. Rosenblatt and Bank of America Securities also maintain Buy ratings, with price targets of $225 and $255 respectively. According to analysts tracked by CNN, the average price target stands at $200, representing a 47% increase from the stock's current price of $135.91.
